creator: jason.mours@verizon.net
text:
Hate to open up a bug over this. As of 9-18-2019 running :

freebsd-update fetch / install

My USB mouse has lost click functionality. No 1/2/3 button response. No highlights or click & paste buffer. Cursor is present and axis is responsive. moused seems irrelevant. I had moused turned off prior. I don't have a working X window. I am not a hack, hunt and peck has slowed my progress.

My guess is kernel, anyone else seeing this? I'm not there in source yet.
